dr-wizard.description: Orchestrator for the decision-record planning pipeline. Reads current pipeline state and drives the next phase forward — intake, scope, decisions, tasks, handoff.

dr-skeptic.description: Antagonistic reviewer for decision records. Returns a verdict (pass/block) and concerns from multiple lenses.

dr-decomposer.description: Task graph decomposer. Converts accepted decisions into a dependency-aware task graph with estimates and acceptance criteria.

plan.template: Drive the project through the hard-gated decision-record planning pipeline: intake → scope → decisions → task graph → handoff. $ARGUMENTS
plan.description: Run the idea-to-MVP planning pipeline with hard-gated phases
